title: WCAG 2.2 AA hardening + manual AT audit of rendered site
context: wash-guides targets last-mile distribution including people with disabilities, low literacy, and assistive technology users. The renderer (render-007) provides a baseline, but WCAG 2.2 AA compliance requires both automated checks and manual AT (assistive technology) audit. This task hardens the rendered site to AA, documents a manual audit across a defined support matrix, and ensures printable output is legible and low-literacy-friendly.
objective: Harden the rendered wash-guides site to WCAG 2.2 AA: fix all automated axe/pa11y critical issues, conduct and document a manual AT audit across a defined support matrix (screen reader + browser combinations), and verify printable output is legible and low-literacy-friendly.
acceptanceCriteria: Automated axe/pa11y checks pass with zero critical WCAG 2.2 AA issues on all rendered content pages

A manual AT audit is conducted and documented across a defined support matrix (minimum: one screen reader + browser combination per major platform); all identified critical issues are fixed before merge
Printable output (print CSS / PDF) is verified legible: adequate font size, contrast, and step structure for low-literacy readers; tested via print preview or PDF inspection
Audit results and support matrix are documented in the repo (e.g., in a review log or a11y audit file)
Reviewed and approved by an accessibility reviewer distinct from the author; pnpm build && pnpm test && pnpm lint all pass
output: A PR hardening the rendered site to WCAG 2.2 AA with zero automated critical issues, a documented manual AT audit, and verified printable output legibility.
